MWCapture SDK  3.3.1.1556
  • Home
  • Development Library

  • Release Notes
av_view_sharpen
  1. captures and plays audio and video by using Easy to Use C++ Capture Interface;
  2. adds a slider at the top of the window to adjust shapening parameter;
  3. is developed based on av_view.

Example directory:

SDKv3\Examples\VC++\all_example\av_view_sharpen

Supported Hardware

Pro Capture Family, Eco Capture Family, and USB Gen2/Plus Capture Family

Result

av_view_sharpen
